总结一下吧：
1 购买时会得到中港澳保修卡一张——没有ABC之分，除非你能自己把它分成三份；
2 购买时会得到经销商发票一张，已经包含经销商商户信息。同时会说明购买日期，序列号，价格等等；
3 购买后14天内自行到网站注册，提供序列号，并自行在保修卡上填写用户信息；
4 保修的时候出示保修卡和购买时的发票，必须要“原件”。有这两个即可。——我想因为已经有了原始购买发票，也就不需要多此一举去盖章了。

There is a control, d8, apply settings to live view. The default is on. When the camera is set thusly, the viewfinder brightness is scaled to match that of the anticipated capture. In the studio, you might set the camera to f/8, 1/200 second, ISO 64, and be framing the scene with just your modeling light for illumination. The camera doesn’t know about the strobe, thinks your image will be greatly underexposed, and shows you what it thinks it will look like: black cat in a coalbin at midnight.

The fix: set d8 to off. Now the brightness of the finder is decoupled from your exposure settings. When some flashes are attached, Nikon helpfully does this for you.

Camera won’t focus using strobes

The Zx cameras autofocusing ability, both speed and accuracy, are affected by finder brightness. If the image in the finder is too dark, the camera’s AF will struggle. This is to some extent true of other MILCs, but not so much as in the Zx cameras.

Z6 astro time lapse, some findings, using a Syrp Slider
5 hours ago


Dear All,

I walked into the high Pyrenees to the level of the last remaining pine trees between 2200-2600m

The skies are dark -for European standards- it's also a dark sky reserve @ Pic du Midi

shots were taken with a Z6, D750, and a D800. and a Sony A7 III

If you're looking for a superb astro camera AND time lapse , video combo, the Z6 is the best you can get also to capture the holy grail of a day to night lapse. Noise levels are low a bit 1/2 stop better than the superb D750.

The Sony A7III has to much amplification noise like the D800. The D800 when temperatures drop to 0C it starts to perform well concerning amp. noise.

Battery life at near freezing temperature,

I found out that the D750 comes on top it could continuously lapsing on for 5h20 min, the Z6 reached 4h30 min (silent mode viewfinder and lcd off), the A7III, I expected better performance but it got to 3h40min. At higher temperatures the Sony battery endures much longer.

I mounted Sony 10-18 F4 E lens via TZE adapter ( For those who does not know, Sony 10-18 F4 E covers full frame circle perfectly without any vignetting between 13 and 16mm in full frame mode) and it does not do autocrop. 有消息表示，Nikon已從Sony訂購了一批型號為IMX455的6100萬像素全畫幅圖像傳感器，該款圖像傳感器的相位檢測自動對焦速度比NikonD5、D500更快。但Sony不會使用IMX455圖像傳感器，而是會使用IMX455改進型IMX555傳感器。此外，NikonZ8無反相機很有可能在2019年第三或第四季度推出，而NikonD860單反相機有望於2020年初發佈，兩款高像素相機均有望搭載型號為IMX455的6100萬像素全畫幅圖像傳感器。
Nikon過度依賴Sony圖像傳感器是否靠譜？以色列半導體製造商Tower Jazz工作人員在接受外媒採訪時認為Sony不單是圖像傳感器製造商，更是相機生產商。如果其他採購Sony圖像傳感器的相機品牌與Sony競爭，Sony會佔據更多的優勢，而Nikon及其他品牌可能會被“卡脖子”。
